title: ハルウララからの提案

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've been gathering members, and the team is
really starting to take shape. One day...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I thought up a good team name!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Lessee... It was a super tasty and happy
name! It was...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Uh... What was it again? It was bouncy and
sweet... and um...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I've kind of made myself hungry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara doesn't manage to remember her
suggestion, but at least she leaves my office in
good spirits.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, how about it? Doesn't it sound bouncy,
sweet, and delicious?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That might be a good team name! I'll have to
make note of it.
